title: Array Prototype Last
titleCn: 数组原型对象的最后一个元素

testcases.input: nums = [null, {}, 3] Output: 3 Explanation: Calling nums.last() should return the last element: 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Calling nums.last() should return the last element: 3.

testcases.input: nums = [] Output: -1 Explanation: Because there are no elements, return -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: Because there are no elements, return -1.
